skills: Files > 8000 chars cause LLM truncation — always truncate before sending to LLM
Syntax check compiled code before writing to disk — prevents broken commits
git pull --rebase before committing — prevents push rejections
ALLOW_PAID_APIS must always be False — never change this
All API keys use numbered suffixes _1/_2/_3 — use _resolve_key() helper
Never add mock data or hardcoded test values to production files
TRADING_MODE must always be paper — never set to live
Test files in backend/tests/ — always run pytest after modifying backend code
Bloomberg dark theme: #0a0a0a bg, #f5a623 accent, #00c853 profit, #ff1744 loss
All React components must be const arrow functions — no class components
Here are 3 reusable patterns or skills extracted from the given learnings:
1. **Improve Code Quality**: Continuously review and refactor code to adhere to platform standards and ensure high quality.
2. **Monitor Model Drift**: Regularly check and update machine learning models to prevent degradation and maintain performance.
